Downstream re-renders of the §4.7 clarification (Opus, MECHANICAL): poc/f2b-transfer/judge-1-package/PROTOCOL.md re-copied verbatim from the new §4 (now including §4.7), header note advanced to prereg_doc sha 4d0f7a70; judge-1-package/README.md applied Fable's §B deltas (added the 'how to judge them' guidance after the two format bullets; replaced the mandatory-escape final sentence; the over-reaching 'close-but-not-quite -> NONE is §4's stance' claim never lived in the README so there was nothing to remove; re-pointed the recording instructions at the self-contained judge-1-adjudication.csv); judge-1-package/items-judge-1.md third preamble bullet reworded per Fable's §D (item sections 1–360 byte-unchanged); NEW self-contained judge-1-package/judge-1-adjudication.csv built (Fable's exact 13-line INSTRUCTIONS block per §A + header position,question,allowed_answers,your_answer,comment + 360 rows with questions/options inline and blank answer/comment, keyed by position); data/d-adj-t/judge-2-prompt-template.txt applied Fable's §C replacement of the task+escape paragraphs, its recomputed sha256 updated in judge-2-prompt.md and judge-2-invocation.md, and the judge-2-prompt.md rationale table extended with the judging-standards row.

NO design change: arms, corpus (d-qa-t pin 7179ee6791bd0af643c410872925ff594945c29b563192f6d7c4a872397cee27 byte-unchanged; judge-1-package/items-judge-1.jsonl byte-identical, sha256 57070307f85a0137157143c2b3706ebb2b88e2cfd00706f8f4946c773487add5), seeds, retry budget k=4, endpoints, kills, gates, separation gate, Holm family, verdict rules, and the kill_criterion_verbatim / extrapolation_envelope_verbatim text are all byte-identical to the superseded freeze.
legitimacy: Lawful pre-registration correction, NOT a post-hoc amendment: at correction time f2b-transfer is not GNG-0-signed (absent from registry/gng0-signoff.json frozen_records) and no results-log/f2b-transfer.jsonl exists — zero adjudication data (judge-1 not started, judge-2 not run, no stage-1 adjudication-instrument record appended), so the P-9 first-final-phase-run cutoff was not crossed. The freeze was reset to DRAFT, the prereg_doc pin advanced from c4942eaf to the clarified design.md (4d0f7a70), and the record re-frozen through prereg-freeze under the standard fail-closed lints. This mirrors the registry/corrections/f2b-replicate/1 pre-final-reset-refreeze precedent.
